hooks.command: cd /Users/watcher/GitHere/yame && ACTIVE=$(chainlink session status --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('active_issue') or '')"); if [ -z "$ACTIVE" ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "No active chainlink work item. Run: chainlink session work <id> before editing files."}'; exit 1; fi

cd /Users/watcher/GitHere/yame && STATUS=$(chainlink session status --json 2>/dev/null); if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then ACTIVE=$(echo "$STATUS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('active_issue') or '')"); if [ -n "$ACTIVE" ]; then echo "[chainlink] Session open on issue #$ACTIVE — remember to end with: chainlink session end --notes \"...\"" >&2; fi; fi; true
